Itero
iOS App · Travel & Quantified Self

Live the path.
Itero remembers
the rest.

A private, battery-efficient journey tracker that respects your data and your device. Local-first memory — private by design.

Download on the App Store Free · iOS 18+
Core Experience

Designed around
how you actually move

Four thoughtfully crafted layers that work silently in the background, surfacing when you need them.

🗺

Battery-Smart Tracing

Passive background tracking that respects your battery. Using Apple’s native region monitoring, Itero wakes up only when you move, building a richly-detailed journey log with zero impact on your day.

📍

One-Tap Anchors

Drop a pin the moment it happens. Whether it's a hidden cafe, your parking spot, or a scenic view, anchors give your path context before the memory fades. Always manual, always private.

🔒

Local-First Privacy

Your movement belongs to you. Built on SwiftData, every coordinate and anchor stays on your device. No accounts, on-device storage, and complete ownership of your digital footprint.

⬡

iOS Widget

Stay connected to your journey with Home Screen and Lock Screen widgets. Log your location efficiently with a single tap on the widget.

Privacy Architecture

Your movement.
Your eyes only.

Itero is built from the ground up with a local-first philosophy. Every decision — from storage to export — keeps you in control.

  • All data stored exclusively on-device using SwiftData
  • No accounts, no sign-ins required
  • Anonymized telemetry helps us improve the experience
  • Background location access used only to build your trace
  • Exports you control, formatted for portability
Built With

Native to the core

Crafted entirely in Apple's modern stack for performance, privacy, and longevity.

Swift SwiftUI SwiftData WidgetKit Background Tasks MapKit iOS 18+
Start Tracing

Every journey
deserves a memory.

Download Itero and begin building a rich, private record of where life takes you.
